subcodes.first_line: The pure essence of praise and its quintessence befitteth that King of the imperishable realm, Who hath ever been and shall forever be [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ساذج حمد و جوهر آن ملک بیزوالی را لایق و سزاست که لم یزل و لایزال ذیل اصفیای
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @the power of words; of speech, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @Hands of the Cause, @humility; meekness; lowliness
